entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Lucerne
entry.content:
Wir freuen uns sehr, Dich zum Event SAP Stammtisch Luzern einzuladen. Das Event findet am 15.05.2024 um 18:00 Uhr im Radisson Luzern statt.

Programm
Begrüssung und allgemeine Infos zum SAP Stammtisch Luzern
Vortrag - Überblick ABAP gCTS
Vortrag - Flexible Programming Model & RAP inkl. Integration eines KI-Image Generators
Gemeinsamer Apero an der Bar

Bitte hier anmelden / Please register here

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration. However, if you want to earn an SAP Community badge, please leave your RSVP here as well.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @PM131 ,

It's great to hear from you! Check your inbox - you've got a couple invites to consider!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am interested in the digital skills initiative. I am a veteran (5 years service) and have my BS in Accounting. I graduated in 2021 and began working with smaller ERP solutions. I am very interested in Accounting Software and am passionate about solutioning for clients. I'm excited to have found this program to learn and get certified with SAP! 

I feel I am a good fit for the digital skills initiative program because I am passionate about Accounting Software and enjoy architecting a solution for clients. 

 

Thank you all,

Melissa

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Frankfurt
entry.content:
Brought to you by SAP Community members, the SAP Stammtisch is an informal meetup everyone can participate: SAP users, developers, consultants and architects - come and join us and bring a friend. Due to the current situation, the event is virtual. Find more about the event "SAP Stammtisch" here.

Register here!

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration. However, if you want to earn an SAP Community badge, please leave your RSVP here as well.

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch mit Dominic Beckbauer (CPI Helper) (hybrid)
entry.content: All right, thanks! I think I just read over that fact 😅

entry.title: Adobe Forms SFP: Caption from ABAP dictionary
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to automatically get the caption of a text field from the ABAP dictionary including its translation?

For example I create a new text field and bind it to the PLANTS field from the interface. It should set the caption of the text field to "Plant" if the language for the form is English and to "Werk" if the language is German.

entry.title: Re: Quick update on creating your SAP BTP architecture diagrams with code
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for the great blog!
Could you please suggest how these icons be used for diagramming in LeanIX?

entry.title: How to raise a ITSM ticket using SAP Build Process Automation in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is an automation in which report is generated by executing a TCode in SAP.Once that is donewe have to raise a ticket in Service Now and attached the report.How can we achieve this?

entry.title: Comprehensive Guideline to SAP VMS
entry.content:
SAP Vehicle Management System – An Industry Specific SAP Application for Automotive Industry

This blog will cover following aspects of SAP VMS

 

Abbreviations

Overview

Business Needs

SAP VMS Full Life Cycle

Master Data

VMS Tables and their linkages

How to Set Up System

ABBREVIATIONS

 

Short name

Description

VMS

Vehicle Management System

T-codes

Transaction Codes

VGUID

Vehicle GUID

Int Veh No

Internal Vehicle Number

DP

Dealer Portal

AVC

Advanced Variant Configuration

OVERVIEW

The Vehicle Management System (VMS) is SAP application for the Automotive industry. The business scenario when using VMS consists of procurement and sale of vehicles. As car sellers, companies procure vehicles/ parts (to assemble) from one or more vendors and sell cars to dealers or directly to large end customers. VMS serves as a central tool for managing, procuring, sales/distribution and tracking vehicles.

VMS is integrated into the SAP application components MM, SD, and FI/CO. Vehicle Management System (VMS) is also integrated with advanced variant configuration (AVC). The below note provides details to achieve this functionality.

https://me.sap.com/notes/3033874 (3033874 - AVC: Passing Data to AVC)

 BUSINESS NEEDS                                                                                                                

SAP Vehicle Management System (VMS): A Game Changer for fleet and process in Automotive Industry.

The broad benefits of SAP VMS are highlighted below.

 SAP VMS Full Life Cycle

  1. Usually, for automotive sales, the end customer tries to purchase a vehicle with specific features from car manufacturer authorized dealers.
  2. The dealer searches in stock via Dealer Portal (maybe in Fiori) if an appropriate vehicle already exists.
  3. If yes, the dealer enters additional characteristics for the vehicle which the end customer has desired for like installing a radio, different tires etc. and determines the price for the desired configuration and creates a sales order in system for this vehicle (scenario: make-to-stock production).
  4. If the configuration does not match, the dealer creates a sales order, but not for an existing vehicle. He creates a sales order for the customer’s dream car. The car manufacturer triggers production for this vehicle (scenario: make-to-order production).
  5. The dealer gets up-to-date information on the status of the vehicle in DP.
  6. VMS supports vehicle procurement and sales, including all the postings involved and oversees the entire business process until the time when dealer delivers the desired car to the end customer.

Master Data – SAP VMS

Each vehicle model managed with the VMS is described using a configurable material and the corresponding class. The characteristics, classes, variant conditions, object dependencies, and material masters are to be defined.

Basic master data of VMS are classified as below.

  1. Vehicle model with material master and configuration - Vehicle models are created as configurable materials.

      Material Type VEHI - Configurable Vehicle. 

      Item category group VMS0 -Vehicle VMS

      Item category VTAC 

      Requirement type 041 (order/delivery requirement)

      Requirements class 041 

      Batch management is active.

  1.  Supplier and Customer

The customer is the business partner to whom the vehicle is to be sold. (dealers).

The vendor is the business partner from whom the vehicle/ vehicle part is procured (supplier).

  1. End customer  is dealer's customer - The end customer is the customer of the dealer who wants to buy car. Business partner role VLC001 End Customer is used for creating end customers and managed under dealer partner ID.
  2. VMS role - A VMS role serves as a central control element in VMS. 

There are three types of roles:
i) Organizational Role

This is a role to which organizational data is assigned. Organizational data are like plant, sales organization, distribution channel, division, customer).

ii) Vehicle Model Role

This is the role to which vehicle models are assigned. This role determines which vehicles the system displays to the dealer in the vehicle model list.

iii) Configuration role

This is a role that is assigned to a configuration change profile.

Depending on the vehicle model, the configuration role specifies which vehicle characteristics the system should make visible for the user, and which changes the user is allowed to make to the vehicle characteristics.

Activities to be performed for setting up VMS roles.

A. Assign vehicle models to the vehicle model roles (transaction VELORM).

 B. Assign organizational data to the organizational roles (transaction VELORO).

 C. Assign roles to the users (transaction VELORU).

 

If a dealer wants to create a sales order in DP, the fields in the sales order are filled with the appropriate organizational data. The dealer cannot change this data.

5) Action Control for mapping business processes – Actions are performed for a vehicle within VMS. By an action the different business process can be performed like create or change vehicle, create purchase order to vendor, create sales order/delivery/outgoing invoice (for dealer) and post goods receipt/goods issue. Vehicle status, availability and location can be changed with these actions.

The posting documents that are created by these actions are stored in the application components MM, SD, FI/CO in the SAP system.

There is an emergency report with transaction VELOE. User can use this report to change the status of vehicles without the action controls being checked in need.

Important Tables and their Linkages – SAP VMS

A vehicle exists when the user creates a vehicle in the VMS for a vehicle model using a create action. The VMS uses vehicles as a central object. When a vehicle is created, it receives an internal vehicle number. This number is also the batch number and valuation type number. This vehicle with batch can be viewed as the valuated stock using transaction MMBE Stock Overview.

SAP VMS comprises of multiple Tables for vehicle data storage. The primary table is VLCVEHICLE - VELO: Vehicle.

It will store multiple data of the vehicle like, Internal Vehicle Number, Vehicle GUID, Vehicle identification number VIN (17-character number that identifies a vehicle and is created when the vehicle is assembled, the VIN is an international standard), Configuration, Customer, End Customer, Plant, Storage Location etc.

There are some other tables as well, which are listed as below.

VLCHISTORY - VELO: Vehicle History

VLCCUORDER - VELO: Sales Order

VLCDELIVERY - VELO: Delivery

VLCGISSUE - VELO: Goods Issue

VLCINVOICE - VELO: Billing Document

The Vehicle Manager (transaction VELO) is the central transaction in the Vehicle Management System and contains all the most important functions in a concise form.

This is a VELO screen with Internal Vehicle Number.

 This Int. Veh. No will be passed in Table – VLCVEHICLE and retrieve Vehicle GUID.

 Set Up VMS System

The Basic Configuration of SAP VMS are listed below.

1)    SPRO Path for VMS – VMS can be located under the following path if VMS is already installed.

2.     Number ranges for Vehicle ID

3. Actions (transaction OVELO1)

Action Control

The primary action control usually represents the procurement process, and the secondary action controls the sales process.

After action control definition, the system requires for determining action control, using transaction VELOS. 

 4. Vehicle availability (transaction OVELO13)

5. Vehicle status (transaction OVELO12)

6. Technical definition of action

The action can be performed after they are set up by programmer. Programmer needs to build and assign program and screen in Action configuration to make it functional.

 The note describes how custom actions can be defined.

https://me.sap.com/notes/2505774

Here I have tried to capture all basic information related to SAP VMS which can act as an "One Place Documentation for all basic SAP VMS needs. 

Thanks.

Nabanita

entry.title: GenAI HUB SDK missing Model
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently implementing various applications based on the Gen_AI_HUB.
With the latest update of the models in the Generative AI Hub, the following models from Google
have been added:

These models can be created as a configuration and then implemented in SAP AI Launchapd .
After implementation, these are then also available in the Generative AI hub  and can be used as a prompt.

However, the implementation is still missing in the generative-ai-hub-sdk (current version 1.2.2)
I have refactored the library and unfortunately only the following models are currently implemented in the SDK.

 

Deployment.prediction_urls.register({
    'gpt-35-turbo': OPEN_AI_CHAT_COMPLETION,
    'gpt-35-turbo-16k': OPEN_AI_CHAT_COMPLETION,
    'gpt-4': OPEN_AI_CHAT_COMPLETION,
    'gpt-4-32k': OPEN_AI_CHAT_COMPLETION,
    'text-embedding-ada-002': OPEN_AI_EMBEDDING,
    'tiiuae--falcon-40b-instruct': OPENSOURCE_COMPLETION
})

 

Before I implement my own SDK I wanted to ask if the new models will be implemented in the generative-ai-hub-sdk (by SAP) and if so if there is already a release date for the new version.

Greetings
Dom

entry.title: Re: illegal XML character when export General Ledger to E...
entry.content:
Hi kedalenechong,

Seems that the issue is not limited to SAP Business One only. It appears to be a limitation with XML.

Refer to SAP KBA 2616421 for the same.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Analysis for excel not showing values in master data table

entry.title: Wish to Host SAP CodeJam in Pune
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We want to host a codeJam event in Pune(Kharadi):

  • Location - World Trade Center, Kharadi, Pune, Maharashtra
  • Requested Topic if you have a preference - ABAP Cloud & ABAP RESTful application programming Model
  • Time frame if you have something in mind - No the speaker can decide
  • Contact details (optional - if you would rather, we can contact you via direct message in the Community to gather contact details or other missing information) - kushagra.s@rialtes.com

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Optimize Story - How to reset input control range date filter
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I want to reset the input control, but I could not find a command for this. I use 0CALDAY. It selects data between certain dates, but I am looking for a function that can select all value ranges from the beginning to the end, but I could not find it.

InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().setSelectedMembers("");
//reset all

InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().setSelectedMembers(["APPLE","BANANA"]);
//select only some filter

This selection doesn't work for me.

entry.title: Re: Navigation menu color
entry.content: @chris_illinois can you still check what is under "Color Variables > Navigation"? the screenshot is from "Font Family Variables > Navigation". If there is still only one option, there must be a bug with the visibilities of the different options

entry.title: Re: Shipment Functionality
entry.content:
Hello @liuteng1 

S/4HANA public cloud does have shipment functionality in the form of Transportation Management (TM) 

Shipment management as we know it from ECC, i.e. LE-TRA is being phased out.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: C4C employee data anonymization
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would appreciate receiving some guidance related to the C4C data removal. We would need to remove employee's data from C4C according to the data retention periods.

The retention period was configured, and the termination date of the employee is replicated from Master Data EC system. The challenge that we are facing is connected towards identifying the target population which is outside the retention period and is needed to be removed from the C4C tenant (we wanted to use the advance filter from Data Protection-Personal data removal *Outside Retention Period Only but the filter is not working properly). Is there any possibility to schedule a job which can remove employee's data?

Can you please share how you approached this topic?.

Thank you and best regards,

Eli

entry.title: Re: Dynamic BDC in Table Control
entry.content:
In most of the BDC processes (standard t-codes) it is possible to do a better workaround. Including FB60.

Instead of counting rows try to use "Insert row" button (or similar). This way you do can simply put first item in first table control row like TABLE-FIELD(01). Then press "Insert row" button and table will scroll so you can again use TABLE-FIELD(01) for another item you want to add. It will highly simplify the ABAP / BDC code 🙂

EDIT: I tried and in FB60 it might need a little bit of tweaking (set cursor to line 1 field and then press "Insert row"). Othervise it goes always to next table control row.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello @MarcelErdmann great you are tuning in from Hannover. Did you know already about the location groups here in SAP Community? Idea is to connect local people and learn about activities and events. There is a group for Hannover as well - check it out and don't forget to join it!

entry.title: Re: Customer Engagement apps / roles within SAP S/4 Utilites
entry.content:
Thank you very much @katrin_frenzel, this helped me a lot. I went through the links you have provided and can recommend to check on same problem:

https://help.sap.com/doc/f82d03e9580f4bb89a3e35d64547ac52/1.0/en-US/S4HANA_Utilities_for%20CM_Cookbook_2022.pdf

dont be fooled if the website says this content not accessible, its just behind a paywall and you gonna need a paid S-user to be able to read the documentation.

However, if you are not in the mood for excessive searching, reading countless SAP help pages, cookbookes, guides etc. there is a simple answer to my question: these applications are available with activating the business feature IU_CMS4_ENTERPRISE_EDITION by use of CRM_ISU_FEATURE. Beware, this one needs a separate licensing and business function activation cant be reverted afaik. There are several customizing and integrating options, I didnt tryed everything and will check it in detail as soon all prerequisites are done. What I still didnt understood is the logic to exclude these applications from the SAP fiori app library. Those are indeed not based on UI5, but this doesnt seems to be a criteria for SAP, since many SAP-web-gui-with-a-Fiori-tile applications e.g. are also included, Im probably still missing something. Since here I have always assumed as soon an application has a Fiori tile and is reachable from FLP, it counts as such and is part of the public app library catalog, I must be wrong.

So, summarizing this and keeping my main goal in mind, shallow evaluating the customer engagement center, this here has strong parallels to Homer's Odyssey imho. Based on my current knowledge stand Im expecting it to take weeks of work and significant financial investments (licensing, activation of business functions and system restore afterwards, customizing etc) to be able to answer a relatively simple question. Im not quite sure I choosed the best proceeding, but this was the only option I was aware. Another hint I got: as I was told by a colleague an alternative to customer engagement could be SAP sales and service cloud, I will try to compare those both solutions. If somebody had some thoughts or experience on this, it would be very welcome

Hello,

 

Thank you for the blog,

entry.title: Re: Dynamic BDC in Table Control
entry.content: Batch input is slow, so inserting several lines at a time and relying on defsize is the best option.

entry.title: Re: SAP CRYSTAL REPORT 2020 support ODBC DRIVER 18 FOR SQ...
entry.content: Any plans to put this into SAP Crystal Reports, developer version for Microsoft Visual Studio?

entry.title: Re: How to Update First Name - Univeral ID
entry.content: Yes @Ninqun,

entry.title: Re: How to Update First Name - Univeral ID
entry.content: Yes @Ningqun, The UID name can be changed in the Personal Info tab. If you also want to change the P-user name, you may have to contact the SAP ID Service team by sending email to SSO@SAP.COM. Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAC Header Image Insert trouble
entry.content:
@HenrikG 

I tied to re create your scenario and it worked fine for me. I am not sure of the image file format but SVG format works great. Could you try with a similar format and see if that helps.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance: "Reverse" Outdated supplier status
entry.content:
Hello Community

In performing some tests in an SAP S/4HANA for Product Compliance (on prem, 2023) I set a supplier of a raw material to "outdated". 

How can I reverse this status? I can't add it as a new supplier, the system retrieves an error message stating that the supplier is already assigned to the raw material! 

Do I have to create a new PO with the supplier?

SAP Help isn't very helpful 

SAP Product and REACH Compliance   SAP S/4HANA for product compliance

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @mahesh_varma 

the document Oauth_procedura_inregistrare_aplicatii_portal_ANAF.pdf from ANAF portal has been updated with the instructions to obtain the JWT token sections, but on the other hand the old oauth token instructions have been renamed to "token OPAQUE" along with this statement (translated to english) that worries me!

OPAQUE tokens can be used until 31.05.2024. Starting from that date, all users will only use JWT tokens. This implementation aims to ensure a good stability of the authorisation system. OAUTH authorisation system, and its redundancy, for all services offered via this authorisation mechanism.

Do you have any comment or update on this? 

Thank you 
Regards

entry.title: Re: Field OCRD.AddId (ID No 2) in Business Partner blocke...
entry.content:
General authorizations > Access to Masked> BP ID No. 2

The search bar is pretty useful.
Data.

entry.title: Re: Standard BAPI Function to Retrieve Domain Values?
entry.content: Found RPY_DOMAIN_READ which is RFC enabled and return domain values, can you try?

entry.title: Re: Dynamic BDC in Table Control
entry.content: Where are all this form routines?  Instead filling the BDC table manually, you can record the TA via SHD0. Store this list in a table and read that table, before you want to execute your Batch Input. Before calling "call transaction" you can substitute all relevent fields by your application data. Things like adding a row are then automatically recoreded and executed.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content:
Hi Team,

This is a great start of the challenge! Nice music!🎶

Trying changing to front camera for a selfie, its was a easy change

entry.title: Re: Nice (yet another) way to enable barcode scanner in C4C custom development
entry.content:
Hi @VishnAndr .

Is this functionality "Enable barcode scanner" available for SAP Business ByDesign?

I don't see the section Fiori Client Specific in the UI Designer...

Regards,

Kostadin

entry.title: ByDesign Cloud Application Studio Input field barcode scanner
entry.content:
Hello community,

I am building a new work center and screens for the SAP ByDesign Mobile App.

I have a requirement to have a field where the user scans a barcode/serial number with the camera.

I saw in this blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/nice-yet-another-way-to-enable-barcode-scanner-in-c4c-custom-development/ba-p/13349908 that there is an input field type where we can set a property enable barcode scanner to true.

However when I logged in the studio for the ByDesign tenant, I don't see this section Fiori Client Specific and there is no enableBarcodeScanner property.

Can somebody tell how to achieve the barcode scanning functionality in a custom field for a new screen in the ByDesign Mobile App?

Thanks in advance,

Kostadin Terziev

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hello @giulia-felappi 

That's correct. As of the specified date mandated by the Tax authority, only JWT tokens will be operational. According to my understanding, opaque tokens will cease to function at that time. Additionally, I'd like to inform you that the provision for JWT tokens is already available in the communication settings application. You can now manage the JWT token within the same token field as before.

Thank you and Regards.

Mahesh Varma

entry.title: batch generation in ewm (ECC6)
Re: Purchasing categories/ SAP S4 HANA PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content: Hello! These documentations are already accessible to customers. I believe that if you don't have access, there must be a lack of viewing role. As a guide, I recommend that you check this in your company first (internally), as to which role is missing to view this. If, after this verification, you still have questions, I recommend contacting the CIC team for assistance on this link https://support.sap.com/en/contact-us.html

entry.title: 404 error while calling SAP Build Work Zone Notification API in BAS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am trying to access Notification api using ajax call in SAPUI5 BAS to push notification on SAP build work zone(Launchpad site) but I am getting 404 error in the network. Even I am getting same error after deploying the app to cloud foundary.

I have done steps below.

1. Created destination in BTP

2. Configured route in xs-app.json

Do I need to upadate something in mta.yaml to work?

Code in SAPUI5 - 

var appId = this.getOwnerComponent().getManifestEntry("/sap.app/id");
var appPath = appId.replaceAll(".", "/");
var appModulePath = jQuery.sap.getModulePath(appPath);
var xsrfUrl =  appModulePath + "/Notify/v2/Notification.svc/Notifications";
 $.ajax({
                    url: xsrfUrl,
                    headers: {
                        "X-CSRF-Token": "fetch"
                    },
                    async: false,
                    type: "GET",
                    success: function (oData, status, xhr) {
                    },
                    error: function (oError) {
                    }
                });
I want to fetch token from this URL to do post call for a notification.

Can you please give me solution?

Thanks in advance!

Note: The same url is working in Postman and I am able to push notication to launchpad

Best Regards,

Vikas Kumar

SAPUI5  SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  SAP Fiori Launchpad OData

entry.title: require to know why batch number did not get generated in ewm for inbound delivery
entry.content:
we have a few materials where the batch number did not get automatically created in EWM good receipt inbound delivery

the vendor batch number is entered however get an error message require a batch number - this should have been automatically generated.

 

what are the likely causes for this?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hello everyone, I am Sailee from India and working as an SAP Integration consultant. Excited to join this community and eager to learn and contribute.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - %Subtotal in Hierarchies
entry.content:
@deobald1 

Subtotals% are calculated by each level and not rolled up so it will calculate ST% separately for parent nodes and child. 

What you need is kind of contribution % so you should calculate it explicitly by dividing the child value by the Grandtotal. Grand total you can get by Grandtotal formula in story and then just calculate contribution by [Measure]/GT

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Kyma Subscription Eventing issue for Cx Enhancment
entry.content:
Hi @Gaurav,

No apart from 404 we dont see any error, PFA Below screenshot! 😞

entry.title: Re: PURCHASE ORDERS
entry.content: I found solution that complete delivery is not enable in the system to rectifiy this error.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Structure for Developer
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, learning ABAP development and working in SD Moule.
Are there Courses or Documents that help to understand SAP system from the Developer's point of view?
Where I can understand the flow of the data and code, learn the best practices, restrictions functions, etc.
Learn about implementing Extensions, Enhancements, Amendments, and Exist.
Also learn about extending or enhancing Fiori Launchpad Apps.
BAPI, ALV, etc.

entry.title: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a problem with an ALV OO, I'm using hotspot and edit, but not on the same field and when I click on the hotspot field it always retrieve index = 1. I commented edit functionality and hotspot works fine but the requirement is to have both. Any suggestion? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Optimize Story - How to reset inp...
entry.content:
@mturan 

May be you can try the below API

setAllMembersSelected
setAllMembersSelected(): void
 
Selects all members on the input control. Note: Not supported for excluded members, range filters and advanced filters.

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

Marcel

entry.title: Re: FBL5N layout - field is missing data
entry.content:
I had the same problem. I fixed it running BALVBUFDEL. This program is responsible for deleting cache for some reports.

I hope could help someone.

entry.title: Re: SAP CX extract data to Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Alberto,

There is no direct Supported Connection Type for SAP CX (Customer Experience) in SAP Datasphere As you mentioned you can use Generic OData Connections as SAP CX seems to have a quite number of OData APIs: SAP Customer Experience APIs.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - From Postman to OData as a Receiver iFlow
entry.content:
Thanks for your blog, 🙂

I have a question, how do I do if I want to POST on one or two levels of the API ? For example the API of the API_BUSINESS_PARTNER. I want to post on parameters of the A_BusinessPartner but also on the Address that would be in a lower level of navigation /A_BusinessPartner('{BusinessPartner}')/to_BusinessPartnerAddress

Do you have an example  ??

entry.title: Re: Navigation menu color
entry.content:
Sorry, yes only one option under Color variables for Navigation.  What's the process to get this fixed.  So this is one of my imported apps from the old system.  So anytime I need to make a change to an old app, I will face this problem because in the new version the background is white and the text for the icons is white and I don't have the ability to edit the text color.

For new Apps, created in the new community edition, I do have the ability to edit the navigation colors.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano , 

I am grateful for your big help to us achieving the SAP certification.

I am an university student and I am interesed in learning more about SAP. I was informed from my lecturer of the SAP global certifications that can help me a lot in becoming a SAP consultant. I would greatly appreciate to have a chance making a first step in the SAP community.

Thank you for your support!

entry.title: Re: A Better Admin Program for SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @kostertim

In the latest release of SAP Datasphere, the creation of the client application in SAP Datasphere has changed. Now we need to provide a redirect URI. However, the Datasphere CLI (and subsequently your ABAP Program), does not support this. So it seems currently, it is not possible to connect.

Did you experience the same?

Regards

Arne

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Optimize Story - How to reset inp...

It Says

 

 


The method setAllMembersSelected doesn't work as it's not supported for time filters.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Optimize Story - How to reset inp...
entry.content: Hello Nikhil,

entry.title: Re: SF Benefits: Multiple Dependent and Items Claim
entry.content: Have you found how to add multiple dependents in one claim?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere Working Capital Dashboard for SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content:
Hi Enes,

Welcome to SAP Community !

Yes, the inner joins multiples the number of records in the result set of the query.

In your specific example: "INNER JOIN "SAP_FI_HL_TimeSeriesMonthlyValues" as "TimeSeries"
ON "GLAccountLineItem". "PostingDate" <= "TimeSeries". "TimeSeriesDate""

It seems to be there is a high probability there will be multiple records on "GLAccountLineItem". "PostingDate" <= "TimeSeries". "TimeSeriesDate""

I'd recommend you to focus on some multiplied sample records and you would see it.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Send Notification to FLP Launchpad from SAPUI5
entry.content:
Hello Abhinav_Sharma,

Thanks for such a nice blog!

I am able to push notification to SAP Buid Work Zone(Launchpad) from Postman but not from BAS and cloud foundary app.

As you sugeested, I followed same steps but I am geeting 404 in the network. I tried from BAS and even I deployed app to cloud foundary.

1. Created destination in BTP

2. Provided route in xs-app.json

3. UI5 code

var appId = this.getOwnerComponent().getManifestEntry("/sap.app/id");
var appPath = appId.replaceAll(".", "/");
var appModulePath = jQuery.sap.getModulePath(appPath);
var xsrfUrl =  appModulePath + "/Notify/v2/Notification.svc/Notifications";
 $.ajax({
                    url: xsrfUrl,
                    headers: {
                        "X-CSRF-Token": "fetch"
                    },
                    async: false,
                    type: "GET",
                    success: function (oData, status, xhr) {
                    },
                    error: function (oError) {
                    }
                });

 

Can you please tell me what I am missing here?

Thanks in advanve!

Best Regards,

Vikas Kumar

development tools for SAP BTP, Neo environment SAPUI5 SAP Fiori Launchpad SAP Alert Notification service for SAP BTP

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I was informed from my lecturer of the SAP global certifications that can help me a lot in becoming a SAP consultant. I would greatly appreciate to have a chance making a first step in the SAP community.

Thank you for your support!

entry.title: Shared variable doesn't work when exported to excel
entry.content:
We display the date and time of the data refresh through a shared variable in the page/report footer. The value displays without any issues when exported to PDF, CSV, it even works for Microsoft Excel (97-2003) and also displays fine on the screen but doesn't export it when data is exported through data only option; it doesn't work on either "Microsoft excel workbook Data-only" or Microsoft Excel; (97-2003) Data-only.)

 

It feels like a bug but if we are missing an option, please do let us know.

entry.title: Re: Cloud-Native Lab #2 - Comparing Cloud Foundry and Kyma Manifests
entry.content:
Hi,
We are trying to connect a java application running on kyma in BTP with a SAP S4 Public cloud running on the same BTP. However when we try to deploy the java application it fails with an "Error creating bean with name "destinationConfigImpl": Injection of autowired dependencies failed ... Could not respolve placeholder "<environment-variable-name-here>"
The environment variables are defined in config map, yml and annotated in the java config class. Names match as they should and destination and xsuaa service have been created in the BTP. We followed the approach described here
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/the-new-way-to-consume-service-bindings-on-kyma-runtime/ba-p/13540594

Any idea in which direction we can investigate?

entry.title: Unable to connect to Datasphere using the CLI
entry.content:
Since the latest release of Datasphere we need to provide a redirect URI during OAuth Client creation. This causes issues since we cannot provide the code it gives, back to the CLI. This way we are unable to connect to Datasphere using command lines. 

Any tips/ ideas or workarounds for this issue? Happy to discuss.

Kind regards,

Thibault

I want to be able to create both things in the same Iflow is it possible?

Do you have an example of how the Iflow would look like?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Structure for Developer
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, learning ABAP development and working in SD Moule.
Are there Courses or Documents that help to understand SAP system from the Developer's point of view?
Where I can understand the flow of the data and code, learn the best practices, restrictions functions, etc.
Learn about implementing Extensions, Enhancements, Amendments, and Exist.
Also, learn about extending or enhancing Fiori Launchpad Apps.
BAPI, ALV, etc.

entry.title: Adjusting update date
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am working on a solution where PBET is not active instead we have Fiscal year basis.

I was asked to adjust budget consumption date and to replace delivery date by posting date in OF36.

I believe doing so could create major inconsistencies in the system, did anyone experience transitioning from delivery dates to posting date (when FM is already active and with documents) and what were the side effects and is there a way to transition from delivery date to posting date?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: I am from Kolkata  India, the city of joy also known to us as SAP hub.

entry.title: Enchacement for field P2011-PDC_USRUP in t-code PA61
entry.content:
Hi guys,

Hope you are ok .

My requirement is to fill the customer field for time-event, P2011-PDC_USRUP, in t-code PA61, infotype 2011. How can it be implemented? I checked that the name of report is MP200000, but none of the customer exits in there seems relevant for this requirement.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - From Postman to OData as a Receiver iFlow
entry.content: Thanks for sharing. Integration Suite seems very popular now in SAP ecosystem.

entry.title: Re: Data Flows - The Python Script Operator and why you should avoid it
entry.content:
Hi @christian_willi,

I've happily given kudos 👍 immediately for such a great experiment and blog post. Well done! ✔️ Thanks.

With your analysis and findings Python Script Operator in Datasphere reminds me that like you ABAP Engine vs HANA database (Code Pushdown). Yes, indeed Python Script Operator frankly does not use HANA database and that's as you mentioned a bottleneck and we should avoid using it.

Also, it's interesting to find out there is a separate SAP DI cluster which performs the Python operations. 😯

On the other hand Graphical Views are handy as long as their capabilities are satisfactory but also we should note that SQL Views are very powerful with support a subset of the SQL syntax supported by SAP HANA Cloud.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Deactivate incremental search in ABAP editor
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there any way to deactivate incremental search in the ABAP editor? For some reason, when  I press CTRL+F it works the same as CTRL+I.

The keyboard options in the settings seem to be ok.

TIA,

Luis

entry.title: Migration and Upgrade from SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 on Windows 2008 to SAP SCM 7.0 EHP4 on Windows 2019
entry.content:
Dear Experts,


we need to migrate and upgrade our SAP SCM system from:

source: SAP SCM 7.0 EHP3 on Windows 2008 R2 and DB2 10.05.0003 and Livecache 7.9.08.38 (NW 7.40 SP06, SAP Kernel 7.42 SP400)

to:

target: SAP SCM 7.0 EHP4 on Windows 2019

 

We are evaluating the possibility to perform this activity in 2 steps:

1) create a new Windows 2019 server
2) perform an heterogeneous system copy of SCM 7.0 EHP3 system from Win2008 to Win2019 server
3) perform upgrade from SCM 7.0 EHP3 to SCM 7.0 EHP4 on Win2019 server

Unfortunately we checked that we can not proceed with step 2) since SCM 7.0 EHP3 is not supported as per SAP PAM, so we can not proceed in this way.


Can you please provide some details about how to perform this migration?

 

Thanks a lot in advance for your support.

entry.title: Vermont Child Care Contribution Tax Effective 7/1/2024
entry.content: When can we expect to see something from SAP/BSI for this new tax?

entry.title: Re: Help Joining OITW with the Union of INV1 and RIN1
entry.content: Dear Johan_H, thanks a lot, it worked perfectly.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi, I am from Chennai,India

entry.title: Is there a report like FBL1N where I can display all the transactions and the offsetting G/Ls?
entry.content:
I use FBL1N to export all my documents in a given period to Excel so that I can convert all the data into a table that can be easily filtered and searched. I use this data to easily look up and research invoices for AP work. I'd like to be able to view all the general ledgers that I offset each document within its own column without having to individually double-click on each one--the main impetus for this would be so that I could quickly ascertain if I posted something to the wrong G/L. If not, is there a better transaction code for what I'm trying to do?

 

For example, this document above is an invoice for legal services. I'd like to quickly ascertain if I posted it to my legal services general ledger and not something like janitorial services.

Vignesh V

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly ad...
entry.content:
Hello, beam_liang.

Unfortunately it doesn't work because the asset was purchased last year and not this year.  So I receive the error that there were no transactions in current year.

entry.title: Como fazer um Ranking de 10 maiores valores no gráfico de ponto numérico no SAC?
entry.content:
Estou tentando desenvolver um gráfico de barras que mostre o ranking dos 10 principais itens e clientes, juntamente com o total da soma desses valores. No entanto, estou enfrentando dificuldades para garantir que o total represente apenas os 10 primeiros itens, em vez de todos os itens. Também tentei criar um gráfico de ponto numérico para exibir a soma dos 10 itens mais vendidos, mas ele está mostrando a soma de todos os itens. Alguém tem alguma sugestão de como posso garantir que o total represente apenas a soma dos 10 itens mais classificados?

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: 1H 2024 Learning - Best Practices Content Upgrade System Configuration
entry.content: Can you please clarify what is included when we enable this setting? What are the impacts?

entry.title: Re: Create bill of material using copy from same plant but another usage
entry.content: This worked. Thanks so much!

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect to Datasphere using the CLI
entry.content:
Hi Thibault,

It's interesting to see there is only one change regarding OAuth Client in the latest version 2024.8

But it's not directly anything about OAuth Client's redirect URI! It's just about token and refresh token lifetimes. 

There must be an issue related to this change. You can reach SAP support and submit an incident. 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: A Better Admin Program for SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @arnefeys,

FYI - @Thibault_dockx has just asked the same Unable to connect to Datasphere using the CLI 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: Bar code field change from Equipment number to Invent...
entry.content:
Rakesh,

That list screen is EquipmentListView.page.  Notice line 54.  That is where the query options that populate the list are kept.  Every time you scan a barcode, that rule will run and repopulate the list using the built in search variable that is passed to that rule from the scan.

In order to change what is searched for, you would need to modify the query in EquipmentQueryOptions.js.  Look at lines 35-41.  Those lines control the searches.  You would need to modify those lines to add another search against your new field.  If the field is on the Equipments entity, then you can just add a line like line 35 that checks the equipment description.  If the field exists in a linked nav entity, you would need to provide the entity/property like in lines 39-40.

entry.title: Re: Who are you?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Ladies, 

My name is Stefanie, and I'm originally from Germany. I started working with SAP in August 1996 at the young age of 19. While I initially dreamt of pursuing creative passions like painting, writing, and traveling the world, my parents encouraged me to consider a stable career path.

Looking back, with the amazing transition to S/4HANA and now AI, I see their wisdom. It's opened incredible opportunities within SAP! I'm thrilled to be part of this vibrant community after this exciting upgrade.

I love this page and this community. Furthermore, I look forward to sharing content, experiences, and offering motivation and support to all of you.

Feel free to connect with me here or on LinkedIn!

Best, Stefanie

entry.title: Error en los modelos de autorizacion con mas de una etapa
entry.content:
Buen dia, se definio un modelo de autorizacion para ordenes de compra que, de acuerdo al monto total del documento puede pasar hasta por tres etapas de autorizacion, se tiene definido ademas que se requiere solo una firma para rechazar o autorizar documentos.


Ha ocurrido que documentos que han sido rechazados en su etapa inicial de todas formas pasan a las etapas siguientes provocando confusión,

hay otros casos donde el autorizador de la ultima etapa a autorizado antes de que el autorizador de la primera etapa intevenga en el proceso.

lo que se espera es que los documentos solo avancen de una etapa a otra en la medida de que estos sean aprobados, y si es rechazado que no llegue a los autorizadores de las etapas siguientes... 

¿habra algo mal en la definicion?

el cliente esta en version Hana 10.0 10.00.190 FP 2202

 

muchas gracias por su ayuda,

entry.title: Uploading Targets with the extended "Manage ESG Data" App
entry.content:
Hello,

On April 2, 2024 they changed the way of uploading targets.

Did someone manage to upload targets into SCT with the extended Manage ESG Data App?

I downloaded an empty template since there are no sample data available. After filling the template and uploading it I get an error.

The template was filled like that:

 

Whats wrong here?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Delete or Clean Error Messages in SAC Story
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working with a SAC live connection model on a BPC embedded system. When I run planning sequences, I receive error messages from BW side, for example, data lock errors due to another user. These messages are identified as red error messages in SAC and do not disappear from the story screen, so the user must close each one individually for all sequences executed with locks. Is there a way to clear the screen or make the messages disappear?

Thanks in advance,

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: It's not possible. Use double click instead.

entry.title: Re: Cross-tab table shows duplicates. How to remove dupli...
entry.content: If you are pulling position table in your query, you will have to set the filter on the mdfRecordStatus = N.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi, I m from Germany and my first encounter with SAP was in August 1996 ... what a journey, SAP 👍  👍  👍

entry.title: Standard control extension fails to load
entry.content: I implemented the standard control extension from the SAUI5 learning journey by coping the code on the lesson. However, the control fails to load. Please see image below. I checked everything even deleted the file and created it again and still the same error appears.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi, I m from Germany.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to get my PM orders with a basic start...
entry.content: HI Deepak, Yes, you are right. You need to configure the priority in OIO2 transaction. It will be set against the order type and when the orders are created and save, system will consider the date as 1 month apart.

entry.title: Re: Hotspot not working when EDIT is active
entry.content: Hi, thanks for replying, I also tried to use dobleclick but same result, it always returns index = 1 even though I clicked other row.
